name: Koi
description: Koi circling a dark pond, each with its own patch of color — every redraw turns the school and re-spots their backs.

code.style: --body: @p(var(--color1), var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3)); --patch: @p(var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 30%; top: 22%; width: 40%; height: 58%; background: var(--body); clip-path: @shape(drop); transform: rotate(@rand(360deg)); transition: ease 800ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; @size: @rand(10%, 16%); left: @rand(40%, 50%); top: @rand(40%, 50%); border-radius: 50%; background: var(--patch); opacity: 0.9; transition: ease 800ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
